topic: the mass layoffs in tech and how to survive
hook: the mass layoffs in tech and how to survive debate in 7 seconds.

script_segments.text: the mass layoffs in tech and how to survive debate in 7 seconds.
script_segments.visual_direction: Split screen. Two options. Text: 'PICK ONE'.

script_segments.text: Left: the old way of doing the mass layoffs in tech and how to survive. Slow. Painful. Right: the new way. Clean. Fast. Choose wisely.
script_segments.visual_direction: Quick pros of each side flash as text. Point left, then right.

script_segments.text: If you're still on the left... we need to talk. Comment your pick.
script_segments.visual_direction: Point to your pick. Wink or nod. Text: 'Comment yours'. Loop-friendly.

caption: The honest truth about the mass layoffs in tech and how to survive that nobody is telling you.
sound_suggestion: game show buzzer / choice sound effect
